title: Google Tasks + monday finally working together (free access for early users!)

posts.author: huysgt (HarryNg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey everyone

We’re looking for a few monday.com users to try out our new app and share feedback. Free access for the first 10 users!

Tired of juggling between Google Tasks and monday.com?

We built a small app that seamlessly syncs your Google Tasks with your monday boards, perfect for anyone using Google Workspace but managing workflows in monday.

Try it out here👇

If you’re interested, just drop a comment or DM me — happy to chat!
